signals.snippet: Hi  I want to cancel my acct

cause_analysis.narrative: Asalona churned on 2026-04-01 after 141 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2026-02-16 via app_chat — 44 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 44 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
